title: Consolidate engine-variant into one per-model profile + resolve-engine-once (fixes bf16-workflow-on-Pod)
description: STRUCTURAL refactor (scalable-foundation). The bf16-local/GGUF-Pod split is smeared across 3 mechanisms — deps (localDeps/remoteDeps), workflow (ggufWhenRemote/_toGgufFilename), and per-consumer isRemote() threading — which has caused repeated half-wire bugs (MPI-163 deps gate/footprint/preflight; now a LIVE gen failure where the bf16 workflow reached a Pod and ComfyUI rejected `unet_name ...bf16... not in []`). Root (4-agent investigation, see research/investigation-summary.md): the workflow swap reads remoteEngineClient.isRemote() (a STALE _active mirror) BEFORE the per-gen refresh() runs inside ensureServerRunning(), so the first gen after Pod connect reads stale false -> bf16 locked -> runs on Pod. Three engine signals disagree (renderer isRemote no-podId vs server isRemoteActive active+podId vs forceLocal which reaches the swap but not the deps resolver). FIX (Option A, user-confirmed): one engines:{local,remote} profile block (extraDeps + workflowSuffix) replacing localDeps/remoteDeps/ggufWhenRemote/_toGgufFilename; one resolve(model, op, engine) -> {deps, workflow, nodes}; engine resolved ONCE per gen (fresh, post-refresh) and threaded as a 'local'|'remote' string so no consumer re-reads isRemote() independently. The OPERATION axis (Wan commonDeps+operations, Painter i2v-only) stays untouched and composes with the engine axis (union). DELIVERY (user-confirmed): phased — Phase A = resolve-once + thread to swap+deps (fixes the live Pod bug fast, small diff); Phase B = migrate to engines: block + one resolver (parity-tested, both axes incl a synthetic op-keyed+engine-split fixture); Phase C = delete old mechanisms + fix residual union risks (_confirmWholeUninstall:241, _opUninstallDepIds:221-222, MpiPromptBox:137) + rewrite the STALE .claude/rules/comfy_engine.md (needs user permission) + update gotchas/memory. Each phase independently verifiable; A and C end on live-Pod user-ux checks. Plan: .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-165/plan.md. BRANCH: RunPod. Relates: MPI-157 (the split), MPI-163 (deps half, done), MPI-164 (verify-bar, separate).
activeSessionTitle: MPI-165 — engine-variant consolidated (one engines: block + one resolver); live-verified both engines + the GGUF-absent repro
